titleStmt.title: SII 7.299: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 299. (A.R. No. 112 of 1901). ON THE FOURTHSLAB IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . gaṇādhipataĒ(ṁ) nāmāḥ . pāṁtu O jaladasyāmāḥ śāṁrgajyāghātakarkaśāḥ . trayilōkyamaṁṭapastaṁbhāḥ
ścatvārō haribāhavaḥ . svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śakavaraśa sāvirada munuṟahadinēḷaneya bhava saṁvaccharada vayiśaka su
dha pāḍya guruvaradalu śrīmahārājādhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīrahariharamahārāyaru vijayanagaradalu
sakalarājyavanu paripālisuva kāladalu Ā mahārāyara Ājñeyiṁda heggaḍe śaṁkarasaru bārakūrarājyavanāḷuva kā
ladali śivaḷiya mūḍela niḍuṁbura grāmada madhyada Uḍupina sthānada śrīkruṣṇadēvarige naḍava Āmrutapaḍinaṁdādī
ptige mūlavāgi koṁḍu bāḷida gadegaḷa vivara śivaḷiya grāmada caguriya Ādivāsadalu kuṁjāttabeṭṭina paḍuvabaya
lalu kalasaṁkaṭiṁda baḍagalū mukkōṇeṁba gadde 1 koyilu haṁneraḍu Adaṟiṁda baḍaga paḍuvalu kukiyagadde
gaḷu 2 koyilu yippattayeraḍu Adaṟiṁda baḍagalu muṁneya gadegaḷu 2 koyilu yeṁṭu Adaṟiṁda ba
ḍagalu sālabaḷiya kallāya gadde 1 koyilu yeṁṭu Ādaṟiṁda muḍalu śaṁkaranārāyaṇa naḍuvaṁtilana baḍaga
bayalalū koḷakeyagade 1 koyilu haṁneraḍu Ādaṟiṁda mūḍalu bhaṭasōmājyara maneya baḍaga baya
lalu baḍaga baḷiyali hiriya gadde 1 koyilu hadināṟu [Ā]daṟiṁda paḍuvalu baḷiyaṁba gadde 1 koyilu ha
tu [Ā]daṟiṁda teṁkalu bāgila gadde 1 koyilu yeṁṭu [Ā]daṟiṁda mēlaṇa hāḷi 1 koyilu voṁdu maneṭhāU ka
ṇanu hūḍi kāḍu sahita dēvara mūla . baṁniṁjada Adhivāsada bayala Oḷage śrīkruṣṇadēvara mūlada baddabāḷina viva
ra teṁkabaḍaga hōha hedhāriyiṁda mūḍalu guḍḍeya gade 1 kuyilu 8 nayaka baḷi 1 koyillu 4 hoyigaya gadde 1
koyillu 8 hedāriyiṁda paḍuvalu hiriya gadde 1 koyillu 9 Adaṟiṁda baḍagalu baḷiya kaṁḍa 1 koyilu 4 Ā
daṟa baḍagaṇa kalaṁbuḷayeṁba gadde 1 koyilu 10 kuduretakaṁḍa 1 koyilu 4 Ādaṟiṁda paḍuvalu kudu
rakaṁḍaṁgaḷu 3 koyilu 8 sitiṁbaḷi 1 koyilu 5 kaṁḍakayeṁba gadde 1 koyilu 7 teṁkaṇa koṁka 1 koyi
lu 6 naḍuvaṇakayyaleyeṁba gade 1 koyilu 4 baḍagaṇa kayyaleyāru 1 koyilu 7 Ādaṟiṁda paḍuvakayya
leyāru 1 hāḷi 1 Aṁttu 2 koyilu 10 guṁḍilada padiladoḷaga mūḍaṇa kaḍeya baḷi 1 koyilu 4 teṁginakaṭu saha
Agaḍiyiṁda paḍavalu pōUgiya gade 1 koyilu 5 Ādaṟiṁda paḍuva paṭelayeṁba gade 1 koyilu 8 hiriyapaṭila
yeṁba gade 1 koyilu 16 hiriyapaṭilada mūḍaṇa koṁkeyeṁba gade 1 koyilu 5 hiriyapaṭilada baḍagaṇa hā
ḷi 1 koyilu 3 Ādaṟa baḍagaṇa kaṭṭu saha mūḍaṇa baḷiya kaṭṭiṁda paḍuvalu teṁgina kaṭṭu 4 Ādaṟiṁda paḍuvalu
yīśvarapaṭela yeṁba gade 1 koyilu 8 hebārariṁda koṁḍa kōḍiya gadde 1 koyilu 8 tāḷetamūrkiyeṁba gade
1 koyilu 5 Ādaṟiṁda baḍaga paḍuvalu murkiyalli neṁgusayeṁba gadde 1 hiriyagade 1 Aṁtu gade 2 ko
yilu 10 Ādaṟeṁda baḍaga muḍalu koḍuṁkuraUlāli teṁginatōṭa kaṇa bāvi 1 Ādaṟeṁda teṁkalu tannaḍe
ya gade 1 Ādaṟiṁda teṁkaṇa yeraḍu hāḷi Āṁtū 3 koyilu 10 sēnapaḷiya bayalaOḷage Adhipaliyaṁba
gade 1 koyilu 8 koḍilatabayala paṭiladalli mūḍaṇakaḍeyalli pareleyeṁba gadde 1 koyilu 10 Ādaṟa baḍa
galu budivaṁta baḷiyeṁba gadde 1 koyilu 6 Ādaṟa baḍagaṇa guḍḍeya gadde 1 koyilu 10 Adaṟa baḍagaṇa Ālu
ḍiya gade 1 koyilu 7 Adaṟiṁda paḍuvalu poriṁkeyeṁba gade 2 koyilu 10 kaṭṭu teṁginamara saha Alliṁda ba
ḍaga hōyigeya gade 1 koyilu 5 kaṭṭu teṁgu saha Adaṟa baḍagaṇa bajatumaru 3 Aṟe koyilu 12 Adaṟa ba
ḍagaṇa bhaṭṭara baḷi yeraḍu Aṟekoyilu 10 Ādaṟa baḍagaṇa muraṁtumaruyeṁba gade 1 koyilu 8 kuḷaṁbeyeṁba
gade 1 koyilu 10 Ādaṟiṁda paḍuvaṇa hosatumaru 1 koyilu 4 paḍuva bhāgiya pēroḷakeyibayala Oḷage muḍa ba
ḷiyalli kōṭeyagade 1 koyilu 8 Adaṟa paḍuvaṇa baḷiyeṁba gadde 1 koyilu 6 Ādaṟa paḍuvaṇa bulaṁthaneṁ
ba gade 1 koyilu 10 Ādaṟa paḍuvaṇa Āṁmaṁṇabāsuyeṁba gade 1 koyilu 12 Adaṟa paḍuvaṇa piṁcada gade 1
koyilu 8 Ādaṟa baḍagaṇa kōṭeya gade 1 koyilu 10 kēsarikanaḍiya gaddeyiṁda mūḍalu koḍaṁkura heddāri
yiṁda paḍuvalu gade 6 Āyidu gadeya ka�na teṁgina mara saha śrīkruṣṇa dēvara mūla . svasti Uḍupina Aṁga
ḷadiṁda baḍaga śrīkruṣṇadēvara bāḷina catusīmeya vivara bayaliṁdaṁ paḍuvalu niḍuṁburara chatrada ṭhāviṁ
da pacinavana gadeyiṁda baḍagalu teṁkilana mūladiṁda muḍalu Uppaḷada bāharigaḷa muladiṁda teṁkalū
yiṁtī catusīmeyoḷaguḷa bāgala gade Āḍakeya tōṭhe teṁgina mara halasama U maneṭhaU kaṇa bavi tuṁbeneka
llu saha śrīkruṣṇadēvara mula Uḍupina bayala Oḷage nāyara gade 1 koyilu 20 Ādaṟa Āgnēyada mūleyalli
hāḷi 2 koyilu 2 sāliṁda mūḍaṇa hoḷagade 1 koyilu 4 Adaṟiṁda baḍagalu buḍaṁbaneṁba gade 1 koyi
lu 2 doḍasāliṁda teṁkaṇa koṁkaneṁba gade Āṟe 2 koyilu 9 kedilada bayala Oḷage baḷigaḷeṁba gade 2 koyilu 6
Uḍupina sanatha teṁkalu tinakaḷade kormūḍinavana bagila gadeyiṁda teṁkalu palaḍiya haḷigaḷu kollaḷa
da samīpadalu 3 koyilu 4 śrīkriṣṇadēvariṁda niḍuṁburaru senapaḷiya bayala Oḷage yeṁṭu gadega
ḷa tegadukoṁḍu Āḍake dēvarige pratipaṇeya pāḍiya bayalaOḷage sarvamānyavagi dārapūrvakavāgi
la 1 koyilu 8 kaṁgabeṭinali rāmakaṁgina janarjana kaṁginatanu koṭha U Ali kaṇa bavi Āṟeyakalu sa
ha dēvara mūla Ārkaḷapūḍina mūḍakaḍeyalu kaṁṇāraḍikayaṁba bhāḷu majalu makki mane ṭhaU kaṇa bāvi
gaḷu keṟe hola teṁgu halasumāU Oṭheyamara saha terategadu Āyivatarali 7 mūḍe Akkigēṇi saha bumi
dēvara mūla beḷikāḷayi Ādivāsadalu kaṁṇaraneṁbavanu koṭa bāḷa catusīmeya vivara kaṁḍiṁ paḍuvalu
kuṁñaṇabāḷiṁda gōviṁdakaṁṇarana kaḍuvina baḷiṁde bayariṁjatavana tōṭha kaḍuvaḷiṁdaU baḍagalu siddha
ṟa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu hōraḷakaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīme [O]ḷagaṇa kaṭeyagaḍi dēvasvada gade baya
lagade saha 5 gadegaḷu makki mane ṭhāU bhāvi kaḷa Ōṇi teṁgina tōṭa hola nela kaṁṇaṟa niṁdakoṁḍa janāna saha śrīkriṣṇa
dēvaramūla . Uḍulāḷabaḷiyiṁda Āda teṁkalu koyilu 3 dēvara mūla bayalura bayalaOḷage dēvara gade
yeṁba gade 1 kuṁḍila gade 1 koyilu 4 dēvara mūla hājevanālimātadagadeyeṁba gade dēvara mūla
Uḍupina bayala gadegaḷa gēṇiyiṁda pāyasamosarōgaru cipaliyiṁdivanu nālvane beḷātige Akkiyiṁda dinadina
suvaru saguribaṁniṁja koṭa Uru Aṁtu muṟu Adhivasada mūlada dēvasvada gēṇiyiṁda kanaṟe yippattu
naṁdādīpti ḷanu yippattuhāgi yeṁṭu maṁdi parupattinavaru naḍasibaharu .
Digital edition of SII 7.299 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
